name: buchhaltungsbutler-mcp
description: Manage receipts, transactions, invoices, and postings in BuchhaltungsButler through natural language.
long_description:
Connects Claude to the BuchhaltungsButler German accounting API. Covers accounts, transactions, receipts, postings, invoices (including e-invoicing/XRechnung/ZUGFeRD), debtors, creditors, and cost locations.

This is an unofficial, community-built project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by BuchhaltungsButler. It can create, modify, and delete real accounting data -- always review what Claude is about to do before confirming, and verify postings/bookings yourself before relying on them for tax filings or other compliance purposes.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all payment/bank accounts (Zahlungskonten)

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create a new payment/bank account

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List bank transactions with filters (date, account, sender/recipient)

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Get a single transaction by ID

tools.name: create_transaction
tools.description: Create one or batch (up to 50) transactions

tools.name: assign_receipt_to_transaction
tools.description: Assign, unassign, or batch-assign receipts to transactions

tools.name: get_assigned_documents
tools.description: Get receipts assigned to a transaction, or transactions assigned to a receipt

tools.name: list_receipts
tools.description: List receipts (Belege) with filters (direction, dates, status, counterparty)

tools.name: get_receipt
tools.description: Get a single receipt by ID, optionally including file content

tools.name: create_receipt
tools.description: Create one or batch (up to 50) receipts

tools.name: upload_receipt
tools.description: Upload a receipt file (base64 or URL) with optional metadata

tools.name: manage_receipt
tools.description: Delete or restore a receipt

tools.name: list_postings
tools.description: List postings (Buchungen) within a date range

tools.name: create_posting
tools.description: Create receipt, transaction, or free postings (single or batch)

tools.name: unconfirm_posting
tools.description: Reopen a posting to allow modifications

tools.name: assign_receipt_to_posting
tools.description: Assign a receipt to an existing free posting

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create and finalize an invoice, credit note, or offer

tools.name: create_e_invoice
tools.description: Create an e-invoice (XRechnung/ZUGFeRD) with structured tax data

tools.name: create_invoice_draft
tools.description: Create an invoice draft for later editing

tools.name: manage_debtors
tools.description: List, add, batch-add, or update debtor accounts (Debitoren)

tools.name: manage_creditors
tools.description: List, add, batch-add, or update creditor accounts (Kreditoren)

tools.name: manage_posting_accounts
tools.description: List, add, or update posting accounts (Buchungskonten)

tools.name: list_cost_locations
tools.description: List cost locations (Kostenstellen)

tools.name: manage_cost_location
tools.description: Add, update, or delete a cost location

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a transaction or receipt

bb_api_client.title: API Client
bb_api_client.description: Your BuchhaltungsButler API Client ID (found under Settings → API in your BuchhaltungsButler account)

bb_api_secret.title: API Secret
bb_api_secret.description: Your BuchhaltungsButler API Secret (found under Settings → API in your BuchhaltungsButler account)

bb_api_key.title: API Key
bb_api_key.description: Your BuchhaltungsButler API Key (found under Settings → API in your BuchhaltungsButler account)
